items.title: Command injection pattern analysis
items.findings: 30+ exec imports, ~20 call sites. All use execFile/array args. No shell string interpolation found.

items.title: Path traversal pattern analysis
items.findings: 1841+ path.join calls, strong protections overall. 2 potential risks in session ID path handling.

items.title: SQL injection pattern analysis
items.findings: All SQLite queries parameterized. FTS input sanitized. No string interpolation in queries.

items.title: Weak cryptography analysis
items.findings: Math.random used only for cosmetic purposes. sha1 used only for fingerprinting. crypto.randomBytes/randomUUID used for tokens/keys.

items.title: Data exposure analysis
items.findings: No actual secrets found in console.log/logger call sites. No credential leaks in error messages.

items.title: Insecure deserialization analysis
items.findings: 296+ JSON.parse calls. 3 medium-risk sites: WebSocket message handler, SSE stream parser, CLI parameter parsing — no schema validation at these boundaries.

items.title: Review SECURITY.md
items.findings: SECURITY.md presents partial/misleading security posture. Covers Docker/Node.js hardening but omits skill execution model entirely. Basic disclosure process (single Gmail). No explicit threat model.

items.title: Review security documentation
items.findings: 21 docs reviewed. Excellent hardening guidance overall. 6 doc-vs-code gaps found. Most critical: skill trust boundary undocumented; sandbox off by default and omitted from secure baseline config.

items.title: Review configuration examples
items.findings: 16 files reviewed. 11 findings: real phone number in .env.example, weak example gateway tokens, inline API keys normalized to placeholders, legacy Claude web scraping vars in docker-compose.yml. Good secure defaults overall.

items.title: Run pnpm audit
items.findings: 1,209 deps scanned. 1 moderate CVE: request package SSRF vulnerability, present only in optional Matrix extension. No critical or high severity CVEs.

items.title: Dependency count and pinning analysis
items.findings: 53 prod + 20 dev direct deps. 78% use caret ranges (not pinned). 4 pre-release prod deps. 8 native build scripts. typebox version conflict. No pnpm audit step in CI pipeline.

items.title: Check outdated packages
items.findings: Security overrides maintained for tar/tough-cookie/qs/fast-xml-parser. Sole audit CVE (request SSRF) has no available patch.

items.title: Run test suite
items.findings: 6,199 passed, 28 failed, 1 skipped. All failures from missing LanceDB native dependency — not security-related. Gateway tests: 219/219 passed.
